scripts.build:binary: node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('dist/sea-entry.cjs', [\"const { join, dirname } = require('node:path');\", \"const { pathToFileURL } = require('node:url');\", '', \"import(pathToFileURL(join(dirname(process.execPath), 'main.js')).href).catch((error) => {\", \"    console.error(error);\", \"    process.exitCode = 1;\", \"});\", ''].join('\\n'))" && node --experimental-sea-config sea-config.json && cp $(command -v node) dist/kargadan && npx postject dist/kargadan NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/kargadan-sea.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2
scripts.build:sea: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:binary
